headline: Is It Time To Reassess Clorox (CLX) After A 33% One-Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Clorox stock looks cheap or simply cheaper than it used to, the recent share price and valuation checks provide several points to consider. The stock last closed at US$86.12. Shareholders have seen declines of 10.8% over 7 days, 14.9% over 30 days, 14.6% year to date, and 33.4% over 1 year, extending to 42.8% over 3 years and 45.1% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on how Clorox fits within the broader Household Products sector and how investors are...
